titleStmt.title: SII 25.198: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 198. (A.R. No. 198 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This record furnishes the details of date viz., Regnal year 31, Ṛishabha śu 7, Sunday, Makha-nakshatra corresponding to 1247 A.D., May 12, Sunday, f.d.t. º09.

It records the grant of iru-mā-arai lands called Kommaḍich-chey as tirunāmattukkāṇi and iṟaiyili to provide for the food-offerings to the deity Sūryadēva enshrined in the northern wing of the east prākāra (tirunaḍaimāḷigai) in the temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiyār at Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puraṅkarambai-nāḍu by the nagarattār of Vikramābharaṇapuram to the west of Umbar-nāḍu. The ūr has to meet the payment of taxes such as antarāyam, uṟaivēli, kōyiṟṟamapēṟu, etc., on these lands. Among the boundaries of the gift land are mentioned periyakōyil-nambi-nilam in the east, puṟṟiḍaṅkoṇḍa-ppēraiyaṉ lands in the south, Śāliyappēraiya[ṉ*] lands in the west and kollai tax-free lands in the north.

This was caused to be recorded in stone in the tirumāḷigai by the nagarattār. The decision of the nagarattār was attested to by several signatories including the ūr-kaṇakku (village accountant) Tumbūr-uḍaiyāṉ. Three other signatories in this document are Dharamapālaṉ of Pirāntakapuram, Vayirapālaṉ and Udayapālaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Irācarācatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 Iṣapanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakkattu saptamiyum nāyaṟṟuk kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa makattunāḷ Umpar nāṭṭu melaivakaipāyiṭṭa nakaram vikkiramāparaṇapurattu nakarattom Ūrkkaṇakku tumpūṭaiyāṉ kaṇṭu puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷakulācaṉic caturvveti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāt
tāṉa muṭaiyār koyil kiḻattiru naṭaimāḷikai vaṭapāricattu Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkiṟa cūriya tevaṟku Amutupaṭi vañcaṉaṅkaḷ Uḷḷiṭṭavaiyiṟṟukkuṭalāka Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭa kommaṭircey Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattukkuk kiḻpārkkellai periyakoyil nampi nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭap perayaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai cāliyappaṉ nilattukkuk Ivai kaṉakapālaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
poṟkoyil nampi samaññaku Āṉamaikku Ivai pirāntakapurattu taṉmapālaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vayirapālaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Utayapālaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 25.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
